creator: kbyanc@posi.net
text:
On Thu, 6 Jul 2000 gnats-admin@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=19731
> 
> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports
> >Synopsis:       update port mail/pine4 to depend on mail/cclient
> >Arrival-Date:   Thu Jul 06 00:00:02 PDT 2000
> 

  As quick update I just want to add that the pine4-ssl port does not need
updating to depend on the new c-client port. The maintainer, Nick Sayer,
did a great job in making pine4-ssl an extension of pine4. I build pine4-ssl
without a hitch and it gains all the advantages I mentioned in the original
pine4 patch submittal.

--
Kelly Yancey  -  kbyanc@posi.net  -  Belmont, CA
System Administrator, eGroups.com                  http://www.egroups.com/
Maintainer, BSD Driver Database       http://www.posi.net/freebsd/drivers/
Coordinator, Team FreeBSD        http://www.posi.net/freebsd/Team-FreeBSD/
